feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Default Company Code in S/4HANA Public Cloud Organization Structure
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are doing the initial set up of a new Development box in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. While trying to confirm, we have got an error to define a Default Company Code. After some research, it's clear for us a company code must be defined as default, however it is not clear what is the functional impact of a default company code not if it would possible to change to another company code in the future. Also, is there any relation between this default company code and the one each user can define in her/his own setting?

Any clarity will be much appreciated!

Regards.

entry.title: Subscribe Path in Autoflow
entry.content:
I create Autoflow in SAP Sales Cloud V2 for Sales Order in order to create data from sales cloud v2 to s4hana public cloud system via Integration Suite.

I would like to know which path should be entered for Subscribe Path.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Using the Employee Central Assignment ID as Personnel Number (PERNR) in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently implementing S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (S4C) and Successfactors Employee Central (SF). The automatic replication of employees from SF to S4C is part of this.

We would like to have the personnel number of a Worker in S4C (Work Agreement field Personnel Number) to be the same as the number in SF, the SF Assignment ID / User ID field.

According to note DIGITS this should be possible, because the prerequisites are fulfilled:

* We have not yet activated the employee replication from SF to S4C for any SF and S4 system.

* And we have activated the Assignment ID in SF.

But I wonder if it will remain possible to create Workers also manually after the feature to copy the personnel number from SF is activated. Is this still possible?

The situation in our company is that we have both internal employees and external (contingent) workers.

We are a recruitment and secondment agency for SAP consultants hiring external workers on an individual basis for long-term assignments at customers. So these people are no employees of our company but only workers which we hire and rehire to customers through S4C Professional Services customer projects and purchase orders. They should not be part of Successfactors.

I know that Successfactors also has functionality to define contingent employees but for these people this brings unnecessary additional license costs. We do not need any SF functionality for these people. They only have to enter their working hours in the S4C timesheet weekly.

So the question is, can we activate the assignment ID replication from SF to S4C and still create external workers manually directly in S4C without running into problems?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Difference between Localization as a Self-Service and...
entry.content:
Dear Adnan,

trying to give answers for the 2 questions which are touching many general points:

  • You can  decide which extension you may create with key user extensibility and with developer extensibility. In addition the document Extend SAP S/4HANA in the cloud and on premise with ABAP based extensions  provides general guidance and typical examples. The side-by-side extensibility based on e.g. BTP provides even more freedom with regards to technical and business capabilities. There is on this requested level currently no automatized solution to differentiate the context of localization for a specific country or region from other processed extensibility steps. In general, multi-off delivery enables the development of ABAP extensions in a SAP S/4HANA Cloud system and with this supports via gCTS to deploy own solutions on other systems. In addition Scalable Solution for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is available which is designed to help partners build differentiating solutions and extensions for customers.
  • Basically, using the Configuration Localization Toolkit for the given approach and with this transforming a source country to your target country and with this adopting / extending the configuration for the given localization needs is the right approach and no violation to the SAP Best Practices. Additionally for this endeavor you may use all available extensibility options mentioned in answer 1.

entry.title: FATCA field in Vendor master
entry.content:
We are unable to find the FATCA Category field in vendor master S4 public cloud. Please help us by understanding where we can update this FATCA Category field in vendor master S4 public cloud.

Additionally, we would like to know where to maintain the same at configuration level.

Could you please help me

Regards,

Dinesh

entry.title: Payment block substitution Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello! 

i need to substitute (populate) the payment block while creating the Invoice for specific conditions.

As i can see BADI FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION doesn't have this field for substitution.

How can i achieve it in the Public cloud? can i add standard field to the list of target fields? or maybe there is another way to populate the payment block to the document?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to Post Cost to a WBS Element for a Balance Sheet Account
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a unique situation where we are trying to specifically track costs for a project that we have created a WBS element for. However, our leadership team has identified that these costs should be posted against G/L account 27003000 (Other LT liabilities). I can"t seem to assign a WBS element to anything but an expense account. How do I adjust the characteristics of the G/L Account to allow this?

entry.title: I would like to add a master item in BP master.
entry.content:
Dear All.

I would like to add a item as custom item in BP master.

Regarding to that item, I want to definition a master. Is it possible?

※I think if create custom item by apps [Custom Fields], attribute information can't be assigned to that item.

Example

Want to add item : 

business office

Attribute item of business office：

ID             name             branch office name

A100         Tokyo                  Kantou

A110         Osaka                 Kansai

A120         Hokkaido            Touhoku

 

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: How to solve Error Message "Serial number quantity does not match purchase order quantity"
entry.content:
Hello, 
I'm encountering an issue while creating a purchase requisition. The following error message appears:

“Serial number quantity does not match purchase order quantity.”

I've configured the Serial Number Profile (PRSL) to 03 (Mandatory) in the system.

I'd like to understand

  1. Why this error occurs when PRSL is set to mandatory.
  2. How I can resolve this issue and successfully create the purchase requisition.

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Revoke Service Sheet Acceptance for externally created document
entry.content:
When a service sheet is created in SAP Business Network by the supplier and Approved in S/4 HANA Public Cloud, if the Service sheet requires correction (before invoice submitted) there is no option in S/4 HANA Public Cloud to revoke the acceptance and reject to allow the supplier to then edit & resubmit.
The supplier is also unable to cancel an approved SES. (SAP Note 3202464 - Restrictions for Automation of Source-to-Pay with SAP Business Network(42K))

Is there a work around that can be implemented to allow this?

entry.title: SAP公有云版本上传附件的问题
entry.content:
Hi，

我们遇到的业务场景是：用户需要在各种业务单据上传附件。但是，如果在单据上直接上传附件，SAP公有云的空间肯定不够的，客户这边历史附件就有500G了，超过合同上的100G，如果向SAP购买空间存放附件，估计就很贵的。

如果附件使用上传网页链接的方式，只能用户自己复制粘贴上去，不可控，操作也不便捷。

我看到，S4旧版本的附件集成，可以修改单据的上传附件按钮的指向地址，让文件存放到指定的服务器上，而SAP公有云可以修改附件上传按钮的存放位置吗？

或者有更好的方案吗？

entry.title: No output parameters could be determined for document 7000000011
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I have already created the Supplier Quotation and Purchase Requisition configuration. But in Manage RFQ, following the Document Type is blank. Am I missing any configuration?

1. Blank Document 

2. Warning message after save RFQ Document 

3. This makes me unable to create a Supplier Quotation 

 

Please guide me. Thank you!

entry.title: Asset Accounting - Deprecation Below Zero
entry.content:
Dear all,
we have one question question in regards to Deprecation Below Zero.
The help portal describes basically exactly what we want to do
Asset Accounting - Base Method: Treatment of End of Depreciation at: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3e5fcf2c768746049b5627bd5a42f720/4f3dde531ed3424de10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

For cost-accounting purposes we require the deprecation below zero. The help page indicates in the yellow marked part, that it is required that the depreciation area permits a negative net book value.
We struggle to identify in the cloud version how to configure the deprecation area so that it permits a negative book value.

Anyone has an idea if
a) the help description for the cloud version is correct and it is possible to configure the system as required and if yes how to achieve it
Or
b) help us in finding a solution/workaround if a) is not the case?

Thanks
Tobias

entry.title: SAP Market Rates Management differs with ECB exchange value.
entry.content:
How to compare the market datafeed currency exchange rates of the historic data with the currency exchange rates in the App Currency Exchange Rates.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Region codes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
How to Configure New Regions or edit the region codes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?

entry.title: Restriction for Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have requirement to create custom business object. We able to created custom business object and have field "Plant" from Association to Business Object.

We already gave the authorization on business role for a specific plant, but we will still able to create new record using different plant with the one we set up.

Any Suggestion?

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Custom CDS API - Fiori element - control on user
entry.content:
I'm on S4 Public Cloud edition. 
I've created a custom CDS for seeing Purchase requisition of a requestor (based on user id).
The CDS works fine in Data browser

But I expose the CDS by using communication arrangement with a dedicated user.

I've created a Fiori Element App based on this API but the user taken into account is not the connection user but the user of the arrangement. I've deployed it on Cloud foundry (I have the possibility to deploy it also on Build Work Zone)

If someone has an idea to solve this issue. 
Get the user information in the Fiori element and Ask the API with this user ?

As I'm in a public version, I can't develop anything.

entry.title: Not able to create communication arrangement for Business partner
entry.content:
While configuring communication arrangement , getting error as "Enter a Business System ID".


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Can´t find the output/PDF of a Loading Instruction I´ve printed on the Warehouse Outbound Processing
entry.content:
Hello!
I´m doing test scripts/scope items of the Cloud Public Edition.
On the 3BS, Warehouse Outbound Processing, I can´t find the PDF to check the output of the Loading Instruction printed on the step 4.8 Print Loading Instruction (Optional). Does anyone have a clue on how to check/see that?

*At first I thought its because I don´t have the TM. But the step doesn´t say its only available for TM (some others on this very test script say its required some TM things). But the 4.8 Print Loading Instruction (Optional) doesn´t have a note on that regard. So I am assuming its not related to that.

Best Regards

entry.title: Possible Issue with SAP Fiori Generator v1.16.0 (OData V4 Service Detection)
entry.content:
Hello @SAPSupport ,

I'm experiencing unexpected behavior with the SAP Fiori Generator (@sap/generator-fiori version 1.16.0) in the SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) when trying to create a List Report application based on an OData V4 UI service. Even though I'm selecting an OData V4 service, the generator seems to be defaulting to V2 templates, causing the generated application to render only a blank page.

Is this a known issue, or is there a workaround to ensure the generator adheres to OData V4 templates?

I would appreciate any insights or guidance on resolving this behavior.

Best regards,
